query:
UPDATE room_summary_members SET
                display_name = COALESCE($3, display_name),
                avatar_url = COALESCE($4, avatar_url),
                membership = COALESCE($5, membership),
                is_hero = COALESCE($6, is_hero),
                last_active_ts = COALESCE($7, last_active_ts),
                updated_ts = $8
            WHERE room_id = $1 AND user_id = $2
            RETURNING id as "id!", room_id as "room_id!", user_id as "user_id!",
                      display_name as "display_name?", avatar_url as "avatar_url?",
                      membership as "membership!", is_hero as "is_hero!",
                      last_active_ts as "last_active_ts?", updated_ts as "updated_ts!", created_ts as "created_ts!"
